title: Foundation of Omegalab
description: Established with a bold vision to provide accurate, unbiased, and reliable testing and calibration services to the industry.

title: NABL Accreditation
description: Received first NABL accreditation in the field of metal (Chem & Mech)

title: Scope Expansion
description: Building Material, Soil & Rock testing Facility add in the accreditation scope (NABL).

title: Infrastructure Growth
description: New building (Kolkata Lab-2) added under NABL accreditation with a huge expansion in lab area.

title: New Testing Scope
description: “Plastic & textile” testing added under accreditation scope (NABL).

title: Regional Expansion
description: Two new lab one in “Siliguri” and another in “Ranchi” got their first NABL accreditation.

title: Odisha & New Building
description: Added one more new lab in Odisha near Bhubeneswer. Total 5 labs under NABL accredited in eastern India. New Building added for expansion of the laboratory.
points: New lab in Odisha near Bhubaneswar
Total 5 NABL labs in Eastern India
